name: data-sets
description: Data commands manage model-space scalar, vector, tensor, and label data. They are useful for imported measurements, interpreted geology, and overlaying external results with FLAC model plots.

data_types.use: Point measurements such as pore pressure, elevation, or material index.
Directional measurements such as displacement or velocity vectors.
Stress/strain tensor measurements or interpreted tensor fields.
Text labels for annotations, stations, or named locations.

validation_notes: Keep units and coordinate system in the data-set name or metadata.
Group imported data immediately so later plots and exports remain selectable.
Use plot data items to confirm imported data align with the model domain.
